--- Water Genasi — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Water Genasi — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Water Genasi — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Water Genasi — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 44/67
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 12 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 16/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Water Genasi — Bardic Musician --- HP: 16/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (16/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Water Genasi — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Water Genasi — Bardic Musician (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Water Genasi — Bardic Musician
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Water Genasi — Bardic Musician HP: 1/67
→ Concentration save: [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
→ Bite: [d20:1+10=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
